Phillips Edison & Company ( (PECO) ) has provided an update.

Phillips Edison & Company is reaffirming its 2024 fiscal year guidance and announcing preliminary guidance for 2025 as part of a virtual business update. The company forecasts improvements in net income per share and core FFO, with significant acquisitions planned, signaling strategic growth and stability in the retail real estate sector.

data.title: eEnergy Group PLC Strengthens Leadership with Strategic Option Awards
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest announcement is out from eEnergy Group ( (GB:EAAS) ).

eEnergy Group PLC announced the award of options to its executive management team to align their efforts with long-term shareholder value and incentivize retention. The awards involve 3,900,000 ordinary shares structured to qualify for tax advantages, reflecting feedback from institutional investors. This move aims to strengthen the company’s operational focus and reinforce its leadership position in the energy efficiency sector.

More about eEnergy Group

eEnergy Group PLC is a digital energy services provider in the UK, focusing on helping B2B and public sector organizations achieve Net Zero by offering energy efficiency and generation solutions without upfront capital investment. Their services include LED lighting and controls, solar PV installations, and EV charging management, all integrated with advanced energy analytics. The company has completed over 1,100 decarbonisation projects, particularly excelling in the education sector, where they have significantly reduced energy costs and improved learning environments.

YTD Price Performance: -32.09%

Average Trading Volume: 902,063

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £17.62M

See more data about EAAS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Longhui International’s Share Placement and Subscription Strategy
data.description:
Longhui International Holdings Ltd. (HK:1007) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Longhui International Holdings Ltd. has announced a strategic move involving the placement of up to 21 million existing shares at HK$0.12 each, along with a subscription for new shares at the same price. This initiative is expected to inject approximately HK$2.42 million into the company’s working capital, assuming full placement, thus potentially enhancing its financial flexibility. The shares will be placed by Cheong Lee Securities Ltd. to independent investors, ensuring no immediate substantial change in the shareholder structure.

data.title: Marathon Digital Reports Significant BTC Yield Increase
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Marathon Digital Holdings ( (MARA) ) just unveiled an update.

Marathon Digital Holdings reported a BTC Yield of 22.5% from October 1 to December 18, 2024, and 60.9% from January 1 to December 18, 2024. This KPI reflects the change in the ratio of bitcoin holdings to fully diluted shares, which the company uses to gauge its bitcoin acquisition strategy and shareholder value. The metric is intended to provide investors with insight into the company’s strategy of funding bitcoin purchases through equity, although it does not account for debt or other financial measures, and its indicative limitations should be considered by stakeholders.

More about Marathon Digital Holdings

Marathon Digital Holdings is a company operating in the cryptocurrency industry, primarily focused on the acquisition and holding of bitcoin. The company engages in strategies involving bitcoin acquisition funded through equity capital, and it assesses its performance through key performance indicators related to its bitcoin holdings.

data.title: FIGS Announces Board Changes with New Appointment
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

FIGS ( (FIGS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

FIGS, Inc. has announced the appointment of Melanie Whelan, former CEO of SoulCycle Inc., to its board of directors effective January 1, 2025. Whelan’s experience in executive leadership and consumer space is expected to aid FIGS in its retail strategy growth. Concurrently, A.G. Lafley will resign from the Board effective December 31, 2024, after serving since April 2022.

More about FIGS

FIGS is a founder-led, direct-to-consumer healthcare apparel and lifestyle brand dedicated to empowering healthcare professionals. The company offers technically advanced apparel combining comfort, durability, function, and style, and serves healthcare professionals in North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, and the Middle East, as well as healthcare institutions through its TEAMS platform.

data.title: Guanajuato Silver Expands El Cubo Mineral Resources
data.description:
Guanajuato Silver Company Ltd. (TSE:GSVR) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Guanajuato Silver Company Ltd. has announced a significant expansion in the mineral resources of its El Cubo mine in Mexico, increasing inferred resources by 85% to 35.6 million silver-equivalent ounces. This expansion underscores the mine’s resilience and highlights the company’s strategy to focus on El Cubo as a central element in its mining operations.

NH Hotel Group S.A., through its subsidiary Minor Hotels Europe & Americas, S.A., has scheduled an Extraordinary General Meeting for January 20, 2025, to discuss the potential delisting of its shares from Spanish Stock Exchanges. data.title: Tripadvisor Announces Strategic Merger with Liberty Holdings
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

TripAdvisor ( (TRIP) ) has shared an update.

Tripadvisor, Inc. and Liberty TripAdvisor Holdings, Inc. announced they have entered into a merger agreement where Tripadvisor will acquire Liberty TripAdvisor. The transaction simplifies Tripadvisor’s capital structure, retiring a significant portion of its shares and creating strategic flexibility. The merger, valued at approximately $435 million, is expected to close in the second quarter of 2025 and will result in Tripadvisor operating without a controlling stockholder, allowing it to focus on its strategic vision and operational strategies.

More about TripAdvisor

Tripadvisor, Inc. operates as a family of brands connecting people to travel and experiences, aiming to be the world’s most trusted source for travel guidance. The company leverages its brands, technology, and capabilities to connect its global audience with partners across experiences, accommodations, restaurants, and other travel categories.

Integrated Media Technology ( (IMTE) ) has shared an announcement.

Integrated Media Technology Limited has announced significant leadership changes with the resignation of Mr. Hazran Mohamed and Ms. Jannu Binti Babjan as non-executive directors, Dr. Megat Radzman Bin Megat Khairuddin as Co-CEO, and Mr. Mohd Hazrol Bin Mohd Rosmey as Interim CFO. These departures are not due to any disagreements with the company, indicating a possible strategic shift or internal restructuring. The board has expressed gratitude for the contributions of all departing members.
